message:
🌱 Add argo-events: Azure Event Hub Trigger mission (#1028)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-1132-azure-event-hub-trigger",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Azure Event Hub Trigger",
+    "description": "Azure Event Hub Trigger. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nThere doesn't seem to be a trigger dedicated for Azure Event Hubs. Though you can use a Kafka Sensor to use Azure Event Hubs (since you can deploy a managed Kafka in Azure Event Hubs), it would still be nice to have this integration."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Azure Event Hub Trigger",
+        "description": "Checklist:\r\n\nTest Cases:\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\n\nNotes:\n- parametrization will not work for `fqdn` and `hubName` parameters since the Azure Event Hubs Client is initialized in the `NewAzureEventHubsTrigger` function. Should this be the case, I'll need to add code that does this (but might be a bit tricky since these values are required to initialize the client. Suggestions are welcome on how to solve this\n- advanced features for Azure Events Hub such as sending with a message ID or sending to a specific\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Azure Event Hub Trigger\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Checklist:\r\n\nTest Cases:\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\n\nNotes:\n- parametrization will not work for `fqdn` and `hubName` parameters since the Azure Event Hubs Client is initialized in the `NewAzureEventHubsTrigger` function. Should this be the case, I'll need to add code that does this (but might be a bit tricky since these values are required to initialize the client.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-events",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "argo-events"
+    ],

+    },
